detailed_description: The video showcases a serene sunrise beach yoga session, featuring a woman gracefully performing various yoga poses on a towel laid on the sand. Against the backdrop of a vibrant sunrise over the ocean, the golden light reflects on the calm water, creating a tranquil and inspiring atmosphere. The continuous flow of poses emphasizes the fluid and mindful nature of the practice, highlighting an active and peaceful start to the day in a beautiful natural setting.

segments.why_kept: This segment is the entire video and perfectly demonstrates the core activity of 'sunrise beach yoga.' It shows a continuous sequence of yoga poses, fulfilling the 'process/labor' hero moment, set against an aesthetically pleasing and calming backdrop. There is no 'setup & calibration' or 'post-action dead air' to trim, making the entire duration the semantic core.
